overview: A futuristic, fully animated portfolio website for Muhammad Abdullah — Graphic Designer, AI Tools Creator, Content Creator, and Video Editor at TenBit Solutions. Features glassmorphism design, neon glow accents, scroll-triggered animations, typing hero section, skills progress circles, project gallery, experience timeline, and a contact form — all with a stunning dark theme.
features: Glassmorphic navbar, cards, and panels with frosted blur and neon glow borders
Hero section with typing animation cycling through Graphic Designer, AI Tools Creator, Content Creator, Video Editor
Animated background with floating geometric shapes and parallax scrolling
Skills section with scroll-triggered circular neon progress meters for 12 skills
Projects gallery with 6 clients and hover scale + glow effects
Vertical glassmorphic experience timeline with scroll animations
Interests section with animated glassmorphic cards
Contact form with floating labels, client-side validation, and pulse glow effects
Fully responsive: mobile, tablet, and desktop layouts
Social media links with neon hover effects and scroll-to-top button
